title: Arundinaria pallidiflora

Arundinaria pallidiflora is further classified within the subfamily Bambusoideae and the tribe Bambuseae. The exact classification of this species is: Arundinaria pallidiflora (Makino) Nakai, with its classification being confirmed in scientific literature.
